project:
[outlineBack=#000000][lineThickness=2][u]System Status[/u]

- CPU bar: your processing capacity

When your CPU is maxed out, you'll need to wait before hacking.

- Trace bar: your detection risk

If you're detected, the security system will attempt to disconnect you by hacking your entry point.

[outlineBack=#000000][lineThickness=2][u]Objective[/u]

Capture the Goal Node and take ownership of the network.

[u]Controls[/u]

- Drag to move the camera
- ### a node to select it

Selecting a node reveals its details and available hacking software. Without proxy, only adjacent nodes can be hacked.
[outlineBack=#000000][lineThickness=2]Select a node, then @@@ a software to perform a hack (or press \[1]-\[5] keys). ### and hold a software to view its description.
Drag apps here to use them in the level.
Hold the trash can icon to reset your progress. This operation cannot be undone!

[outlineBack=#000000][lineThickness=2]Well done. One by one, they fell.
Now, all networks answer to you.

[outlineBack=#000000][lineThickness=2]Made with love by the team at Forsteri Studios
[color=#00ffff]forsteristudios.com[/color]
